import java.util.*;
public class Main{public static void main(String[]args){Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);int n=sc.nextInt(),k=sc.nextInt();Map<Integer,Integer>cnt=new HashMap<>();cnt.put(0,1);int pre=0,res=0;for(int i=0;i<n;i++){pre+=sc.nextInt();res+=cnt.getOrDefault(pre-k,0);cnt.put(pre,cnt.getOrDefault(pre,0)+1);}System.out.println(res);}}

import java.util.*;
public class Main{static void rev(int[]a,int l,int r){while(l<r){int t=a[l];a[l]=a[r];a[r]=t;l++;r--;}}public static void main(String[]args){Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);int n=sc.nextInt(),k=sc.nextInt();k%=n;int[]a=new int[n];for(int i=0;i<n;i++)a[i]=sc.nextInt();rev(a,0,n-1);rev(a,0,k-1);rev(a,k,n-1);for(int i=0;i<n;i++)System.out.print(a[i]+(i<n-1?" ":"\n"));}}

public class Main{public static void main(String[]args){Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);int n=sc.nextInt();int[]a=new int[n];for(int i=0;i<n;i++)a[i]=sc.nextInt();int[]pre=new int[n],suf=new int[n];pre[0]=suf[n-1]=1;for(int i=1;i<n;i++)pre[i]=pre[i-1]*a[i-1];for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--)suf[i]=suf[i+1]*a[i+1];for(int i=0;i<n;i++)System.out.print(pre[i]*suf[i]+(i<n-1?" n=int(input())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
L=[0]*n;R=[0]*n
L[0]=a[0];R[n-1]=a[n-1]
for i in range(1,n):L[i]=max(L[i-1],a[i])
for i in range(n-2,-1,-1):R[i]=max(R[i+1],a[i])
print(sum(min(L[i],R[i])-a[i] for i in range(n)))
solutions.java:
import java.util.*;
public class Main{public static void main(String[]args){Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);int n=sc.nextInt();int[]a=new int[n];for(int i=0;i<n;i++)a[i]=sc.nextInt();int[]L=new int[n],R=new int[n];L[0]=a[0];R[n-1]=a[n-1];for(int i=1;i<n;i++)L[i]=Math.max(L[i-1],a[i]);for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--)R[i]=Math.max(R[i+1],a[i]);int s=0;for(int i=0;i<n;i++)s+=Math.min(L[i],R[i])-a[i];System.out.println(s);}}

solutions.java:
import java.util.*;
public class Main{public static void main(String[]args){Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);int n=sc.nextInt();Set<Integer>s=new HashSet<>();for(int i=0;i<n;i++)s.add(sc.nextInt());int best=0;for(int x:s){if(!s.contains(x-1)){int cur=1;while(s.contains(x+cur))cur++;best=Math.max(best,cur);}}System.out.println(best);}}

import java.util.*;
public class Main{public static void main(String[]args){Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);int n=sc.nextInt(),t=sc.nextInt();int[]c=new int[n];for(int i=0;i<n;i++)c[i]=sc.nextInt();int[]dp=new int[t+1];Arrays.fill(dp,100000000);dp[0]=0;for(int x:c)for(int i=x;i<=t;i++)dp[i]=Math.min(dp[i],dp[i-x]+1);System.out.println(dp[t]>=100000000?-1:dp[t]);}}

solutions.python:
s1=input().strip();s2=input().strip()
m,n=len(s1),len(s2)
dp=[[0]*(n+1) for _ in range(m+1)]
for i in range(m+1):dp[i][0]=i
for j in range(n+1):dp[0][j]=j
for i in range(1,m+1):
    for j in range(1,n+1):
        dp[i][j]=dp[i-1][j-1] if s1[i-1]==s2[j-1] else 1+min(dp[i-1][j],dp[i][j-1],dp[i-1][j-1])
print(dp[m][n])
solutions.java:
import java.util.*;
public class Main{public static void main(String[]args){Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);String s1=sc.next(),s2=sc.next();int m=s1.length(),n=s2.length();int[][]dp=new int[m+1][n+1];for(int i=0;i<=m;i++)dp[i][0]=i;for(int j=0;j<=n;j++)dp[0][j]=j;for(int i=1;i<=m;i++)for(int j=1;j<=n;j++)dp[i][j]=s1.charAt(i-1)==s2.charAt(j-1)?dp[i-1][j-1]:1+Math.min(dp[i-1][j],Math.min(dp[i][j-1],dp[i-1][j-1]));System.out.println(dp[m][n]);}}

public class Main{public static void main(String[]args){String s=new Scanner(System.in).next();int n=s.length();if(s.charAt(0)=='0'){System.out.println(0);return;}int[]dp=new int[n+1];dp[0]=1;dp[1]=1;for(int i=2;i<=n;i++){if(s.charAt(i-1)!='0')dp[i]+=dp[i-1];int two=Integer.parseInt(s.substring(i-2,i));if(two>=10&&two<=26)dp[i]+=dp[i-2];}System.out.println(dp[n]);}}

solutions.python:
n,t=map(int,input().split())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
from collections import defaultdict
dp=defaultdict(int);dp[0]=1
for x in a:
    ndp=defaultdict(int)
    for s,cnt in dp.items():
        ndp[s+x]+=cnt;ndp[s-x]+=cnt
    dp=ndp
print(dp[t])
solutions.java:
import java.util.*;
public class Main{public static void main(String[]args){Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);int n=sc.nextInt(),t=sc.nextInt();Map<Integer,Integer>dp=new HashMap<>();dp.put(0,1);for(int i=0;i<n;i++){int x=sc.nextInt();Map<Integer,Integer>ndp=new HashMap<>();for(Map.Entry<Integer,Integer>e:dp.entrySet()){ndp.merge(e.getKey()+x,e.getValue(),Integer::sum);ndp.merge(e.getKey()-x,e.getValue(),Integer::sum);}dp=ndp;}System.out.println(dp.getOrDefault(t,0));}}

import java.util.Scanner;
public class Main{static int n,cnt;static boolean[]col,d1,d2;static void solve(int r){if(r==n){cnt++;return;}for(int c=0;c<n;c++)if(!col[c]&&!d1[r-c+n]&&!d2[r+c]){col[c]=d1[r-c+n]=d2[r+c]=true;solve(r+1);col[c]=d1[r-c+n]=d2[r+c]=false;}}public static void main(String[]args){n=new Scanner(System.in).nextInt();col=new boolean[n];d1=new boolean[2*n];d2=new boolean[2*n];solve(0);System.out.println(cnt);}}
